properties.description: No longer usable even at lowest tide - central sections dredged for Portsmouth and Chichester Canal in the 1820s - technically a historic right of way but extremely dangerous.
properties.name: Wadeway
properties.note: See Wikipedia article before altering: it's very dangerous soft mud and not useful as a mapped right of way, only as a historical feature
